programme.title: The 2026 ESPYS
programme.desc: Top celebrities from sports and entertainment come together to commemorate the past year by recognizing major athletic achievements, reliving unforgettable moments, and saluting the leading performers and performances; Marcello Hernández hosts.

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball action from the NBA Summer League.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 9 Longhorns (3-1, 0-0 SEC) visit the Gators (1-3, 0-1). Last season, Texas smashed Florida in the schools' first meeting since 1940, as Jerrick Gibson burned his hometown school for 100 rushing yards and a TD to lead the Horns' 49-17 victory.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The undefeated No. 6 Sooners (5-0, 1-0 SEC) face the Longhorns (3-2, 0-1) in another edition of the Red River Rivalry from the Cotton Bowl. Texas, the preseason No. 1, fell from the AP Top 25 after dropping its SEC opener 29-21 at Florida on Oct. 4.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: Arch Manning leads the No. 21 Longhorns (4-2, 1-1 SEC) into this outing with the Wildcats (2-3, 0-3). Manning threw for 166 yards and a TD when Texas stunned then-No. 6 Oklahoma in the Red River Rivalry on Oct. 11. Texas beat Kentucky 31-14 in 2024.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hot dog stands to steakhouses; Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Cox Pavilion in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The subject of endless magazine listicles and breathless influencer reels; is it possible to sidestep the algorithms and really see and hear and taste Charleston?

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Louisville Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Louisville Cardinals.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Miami Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Miami Hurricanes.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 22 Longhorns head to Starkville, Miss., to play the Bulldogs. Texas has won five of its past six after outlasting Kentucky 16-13 in overtime Oct. 18. Entering Week 9, Texas' defense ranked third nationally, allowing only 11.3 points per game.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 9 Commodores (7-1, 3-1 SEC) visit the No. 20 Longhorns (6-2, 3-1). Texas defeated Vanderbilt 27-24 in 2024 in the first meeting since 1928. Vandy hung on for a 17-10 victory last week as a Hail Mary pass by Missouri came up one yard short.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 5 Bulldogs host the No. 10 Longhorns. In 2024, Georgia beat Texas 30-15 in the regular season, and 22-19 in overtime in the SEC title game. Texas held off then-No. 9 Vanderbilt for a fourth straight win Nov. 1. Georgia has won five in a row.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 17 Longhorns (7-3, 4-2 SEC) battle the Razorbacks (2-8, 0-6). Texas picked up a 20-10 decision at Arkansas in 2024, but fell 35-10 at then-No. 5 Georgia on Nov. 15 to end a four-game winning run. The Razorbacks have dropped eight in a row.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The unbeaten No. 3 Aggies face the No. 16 Longhorns in a Lone Star Showdown tilt. Texas A&M finds itself in the driver's seat for both an SEC title-game appearance and College Football Playoff berth after starting 11-0 for the first time since 1992.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: Storied programs in the No. 13 Longhorns and the No. 18 Wolverines line up in the Citrus Bowl from Orlando, Fla. Both sides are 9-3. The schools meet for the third time after the Longhorns defeated the Wolverines 31-12 in 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Cardinal clash with the Cougars from Provo, Utah. Stanford has been off since Aug. 23, when it lost its season opener 23-20 to Hawaii on a last-second field goal. BYU smoked Portland State 69-0 on Aug. 30. BYU took down Stanford 35-26 in 2022.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 1
programme.desc: Following a football team in the highlands of Ireland made of members of the same family who speak a language that none of their opponents understand.

programme.desc: In Copsa Mica, the pollution created by industrial activity has impacted the health of the local team and forced them to transplant a football pitch from a nearby village.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 3
programme.desc: With a cemetery behind one of the goals, this is where players of Vilar de Barrio play. The clay pitch is described as the 'worst in Spain' and the coach is running for mayor.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 4
programme.desc: In Ireland, a home captain recounts the previous night's Christmas party, and a tight and terrible game ends with the captain getting told off by his mother.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 5

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In a classic western, Clint Eastwood -- aka Blondie -- saves Eli Wallach from the hangman's noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from; recreating each scene and testing the reality of those shots.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Follow Chase Anthony as he travels across North America pursuing one of the continent's greatest hunting challenges - the North American 29. From remote mountains to unforgiving backcountry, every hunt pushes physical limits, patience and determination. Along the way, the series captures the adventure, wildlife, landscapes and stories that come with a life dedicated to the outdoors.

programme.title: The Most Wanted List
programme.desc: This isn't a highlight reel—it's the real deal. The Most Wanted List takes you into raw, unpredictable hunts where nothing goes as planned and every opportunity is earned. Misses, miles and moments that matter... this is what chasing the most wanted is all about.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Curt Wells and 9/11 survivor Will Jimeno chase elk in the Colorado mountains, where close encounters and missed chances turn the focus to the experience and meaning of the hunt.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures. Each episode details the lives of all clan

programme.title: The Woodsman
programme.desc: Join BVO Prostaffers Darren Tippit, Brannon Haro and Joe Bufford as they chase big whitetails in different parts of the country.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Travel along with the Savage Outdoors crew as they travel North America on some of the most intense big game hunting adventures ever caught on film!

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: A look at life behind the lens from the men that make it happen.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Pete Roberts is the visionary behind Origin USA, a company uncompromising in its promise to produce 100% American made products; to keep his promise, Pete must challenge the idea that manufacturing must be done overseas.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Live The Open: Round 1
programme.desc: The opening round of the 154th Open Championship, staged at Royal Birkdale. A year on from Scottie Scheffler's Portrush masterclass, the Claret Jug is up for grabs once more.

programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.desc: Fishing the Islamorada back country with Capt. Matt Bellinger; George and Lain fight over food at Mangrove Mike's; chef Cat prepares a seared mahi-mahi with pineapple salsa recipe submitted by fan Helen Whitmer.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.desc: The Spear Life crew teams up with Captain Cameron Sebastian in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, to hunt trophy gag grouper on deep offshore wrecks before wrapping up the adventure with a fresh hook-and-cook.

programme.title: Julie Higgs Spearfishing
programme.desc: A lifelong spearfishing aficionado, Julie Higgs first discovered her passion while sailing aboard her family's sailboat in the Bahamas, where fish dinners caught by pole-spear were as much a tradition as a pastime. Now, armed with years of experience and an unquenchable thirst for adventure, Julie traverses the globe in pursuit of trophy fish and uncharted marine species-combining expert technique
